intro: Catch more gold with the SE Prospector's Choice 10"x27" Riffled Sluice Box Matting, a trimmable green miner's moss mat that traps fine gold in any sluice setup.

Test precious metals accurately with this 2-Inch Precious Metal Testing Stone, a durable touchstone for verifying gold and silver during panning and jewelry testing.
Screen coarse material with the Gold Rush 6-Inch Mini Classifier Sieve, featuring 10 holes per square inch to quickly sort gravel in a compact green prospect pan.
Capture the finest gold with the ASR Outdoor 6-Inch Mini Classifier, featuring 100 holes per square inch for ultra-fine gold panning and concentrate cleanup.
Refine your concentrates with the Gold Rush 6-Inch Mini Classifier Sieve, featuring 50 holes per square inch to isolate fine gold in a compact prospect pan.
Pick up the tiniest flakes with these 4X Magnifying Tweezers, a chrome gold prospecting and mining accessory that makes fine gold recovery quick and easy.
Pan on the move with the SE Prospector's Choice Pocket-Sized Sluice Box GP-SB36PT, a compact green sluice that fits in your pack for stream-side gold recovery.
Light your space and charge your phone with the Universal Rechargeable Phone Stand Table Lamp, a 120-lumen touch-switch accent lamp with a built-in device stand.
Protect your bench with the American Flag Non-Slip Gun Cleaning Mat, an 18-inch washable, solvent-resistant ASR Tactical mat for firearm and electronics maintenance.
Stack and sort with the SE GP4-40 5.5-Inch Mini Sifting Pan, a 40-holes-per-square-inch classifier that nests with other pans for efficient gold panning.
Stay warm in any emergency with the ASR Outdoor Mylar Foil Space Blanket, a compact 52" x 83.5" first-aid and bug-out blanket that reflects body heat.
Transfer fluids precisely with the SE GP3-PD55 Plastic Disposable Droppers 50-Pack, clear pipettes ideal for gold panning, science and lab work.
Start prospecting with the 7pc Beginner Gold Panning Kit, including a 1/2-inch classifier screen, gold pan and snuffer bottle to find and store your first flakes.
Test circuits hands-free with this 10pc Insulated Test Lead Set, featuring 20-inch leads with alligator clips for electronics, automotive and hobby troubleshooting.
Polish, sand and cut with the Universal Tool 100pc Rotary Accessory Set, a complete metal bit and disc kit in a wooden storage box for detailed rotary-tool work.
Light up the night with ASR Outdoor Green Glow Sticks, a 3-pack of bright, long-lasting emergency and party glow sticks for camping, safety and fun.
Refine your finds with the ASR Outdoor 6-Inch Mini Gold Panning Classifier, featuring 20 holes per square inch to sort sand and gravel down to fine gold.
